    const prefixPrices = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);
    const prefixStrategy = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        prefixPrices[i] = prefixPrices[i - 1] + prices[i - 1];
        prefixStrategy[i] = prefixStrategy[i - 1] + strategy[i - 1] * prices[i - 1];
    }

    const m = k / 2;
    let maxDelta = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n - k; i++) {

        const mid = i + m;
        const sumSecondHalfPrices = prefixPrices[end] - prefixPrices[mid];

}

import scala.math._

def solve(prices: Array[Long], strategy: Array[Long], k: Long): Long = {
    val n = prices.length
    val originalProfit = prices.zip(strategy).map { case (p, s) => s * p }.sum
    val prefixPrices = Array.fill(n + 1)(0L)
    val prefixStrategy = Array.fill(n + 1)(0L)
    for (i <- 1 to n) {
        prefixPrices(i) = prefixPrices(i - 1) + prices(i - 1)
        prefixStrategy(i) = prefixStrategy(i - 1) + strategy(i - 1) * prices(i - 1)
    }
    val m = k / 2
    var maxDelta = 0L
    for (i <- 0 until (n - k + 1)) {
        val end = i + k
        val mid = i + m
        val sumSecondHalf = prefixPrices(end) - prefixPrices(mid)
        val originalContribution = prefixStrategy(end) - prefixStrategy(i)
        val delta = sumSecondHalf - originalContribution
        if (delta > maxDelta) maxDelta = delta
    }
    originalProfit + max(0, maxDelta)
}
